message:
test(telemetry,ftui): add 35 unit tests for evidence_telemetry, voi_telemetry, and ftui Error type

Cover the three files that had zero test coverage:
- evidence_telemetry.rs: 20 tests for diff/resize/budget snapshot set/get/clear
  with BocpdEvidence, ConformalSnapshot, and DegradationLevel fixtures
- voi_telemetry.rs: 8 tests for inline-auto VOI snapshot lifecycle including
  VoiDecision, VoiObservation, and VoiLogEntry construction
- ftui/src/lib.rs: 7 tests for Error enum Display/Debug/From impls, Result
  type alias, and prelude re-export accessibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
